'''鈭歾h-k-h-g''' ('''kazhakhegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cabosh|cabosh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cabosh|cabosh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-k-h-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazhakhegoko
|}
